app.name: REACTOR: Freedom
app.subtitle: A control panel for reclaiming energy, money and self-command.

auth.hero_text: Cravings arrive fast. Freedom is built from small wins: one clean day, one beaten urge, one person beside you.
auth.hero_motto: Do not quit alone. Build your freedom reactor.
auth.hero_motto_body: Track clean days, survive risky minutes, turn old spending into a goal and get support when the day gets loud.

hero_features.title: Daily control
hero_features.body: Track smoking and alcohol separately and see the streak that is really holding.

hero_features.title: Emergency mode
hero_features.body: Wait out the craving peak with quick tactics before impulse becomes action.

hero_features.title: Money to a goal
hero_features.body: Every clean day shows what came back to you instead of disappearing into the old habit.

hero_features.title: Friends nearby
hero_features.body: Follow people, like their wins and send support at the moment it matters.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in and continue your current streak.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an account and start collecting clean days, craving wins and support nearby.
auth.name: Name
auth.marketing_opt_in: I want to receive useful emails, updates and special offers.
auth.verify_sent: We sent an email to {email}. Confirm registration from the link within 24 hours.
auth.email_send_failed: Could not send the verification email. The account was not created. Check SMTP login and password.
auth.verification_resent: A new email was sent to {email}.
auth.email_not_verified: Confirm your email first. The verification link in the email is valid for 24 hours.
auth.email_verified: Email confirmed. The reactor is ready to launch.
auth.email_verify_failed: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

email.verify_preheader: One step left: confirm your email and launch the reactor.
email.verify_body: Press the button below to confirm your email and activate your account in {app}.
email.verify_expiry: This link is valid for 24 hours.
email.verify_footer: If you did not create this account, you can safely ignore this email.
email.verify_plain: {name}, confirm your registration in {app}: {url}. This link is valid for 24 hours.
email.invite_kicker: A friend is calling you forward
email.invite_lead: {inviter} sent you an invitation to REACTOR: Freedom.
email.invite_slogan: One clean day is not small. It is proof that control can return.
email.invite_body: {app} helps you track days without smoking or alcohol, beat cravings, save money toward a goal and get support from friends.
email.invite_footer: You received this email because a REACTOR user invited you. If it is not relevant, you can ignore it.
email.invite_plain: {name}, {inviter} invited you to {app}. {message} Open it here: {url}

errors.goal_amount: Goal amount must be greater than zero.
errors.avatar_invalid: Choose a valid JPG, PNG or WebP image.
errors.avatar_too_large: The photo must be no larger than 4 MB.

onboarding.habit_title: Which habit do you want to break?
onboarding.habit_subtitle: Pick the reactor target. The dashboard will only show the systems you activate.

habit_options.title: Smoking
habit_options.body: Cigarettes or e-cigarettes: clean hours, incidents and money saved.

habit_options.title: Alcohol
habit_options.body: Track sober time, risky moments and weekly spending.

habit_options.title: Both
habit_options.body: Run a combined control system for smoking and alcohol.

onboarding.reason_title: What are you changing these habits for?
onboarding.reason_subtitle: Choose more than one reason. The reactor will use them for personal signals on your dashboard.

reason_options.title: Health
reason_options.body: More breath, sleep and steady energy.

reason_options.title: Money
reason_options.body: Turn old spending into visible progress.

reason_options.title: Family
reason_options.body: Be more present for people who matter.

reason_options.title: Self-control
reason_options.body: Prove that the impulse is not in charge.

reason_options.title: Sport and energy
reason_options.body: Build a body that answers faster.

reason_options.title: My own reason
reason_options.body: Write the sentence that will pull you forward.

onboarding.goal_subtitle: Choose a financial target. The dashboard will show how old spending turns into something real.
onboarding.smoking_title: What exactly do you want to quit?
onboarding.smoking_subtitle: Different nicotine products have different costs. Choose yours for an honest estimate.
onboarding.smoking_product_tobacco_body: Track cigarettes, packs and pack price.
onboarding.smoking_product_vape_body: Disposables, pod systems, cartridges or liquids.
onboarding.vape_spend_help: Enter the total for disposables, cartridges, liquids and supplies. No need to count puffs.
onboarding.alcohol_warning: If you have tremor, sweating, intense anxiety, insomnia, heart racing or feel unwell without alcohol, do not stop abruptly without medical help.

dashboard.missions_text: Calm actions that strengthen the streak without chasing emergencies.
dashboard.mission_daily_checkin_body: Mark the active habits you kept under control today.
dashboard.mission_quiet_body: Stay incident-free. After the first 24 hours this quest completes automatically each day.
dashboard.mission_commitment_body: Take one minute to return to why you chose freedom today.
dashboard.mission_support_body: Write one genuine line of support under a friend's event.
dashboard.mission_completed_notice: Mission complete. The reactor gained charge.
dashboard.mission_after_lunch_body: Prepare water, a short walk or a 90-second SOS after eating.
dashboard.mission_evening_no_alcohol_body: Plan the evening early: food, water, shower, sleep without the old script.
dashboard.mission_sos_craving_body: If the wave comes, start emergency mode and save the win.
dashboard.mission_steps_body: Movement drops tension and gives the body a feeling of control.
dashboard.mission_buy_self_body: A small purchase instead of the old habit shows who the money serves now.
dashboard.mission_trigger_note_body: Name the moment where the habit usually starts. A named trigger is weaker.
dashboard.mission_sleep_without_alcohol_body: Close the day so tomorrow starts with a clear head.
dashboard.mission_clean_evening_body: Choose one calm evening ritual instead of an automatic cigarette.
dashboard.mission_reward_body: A small action became visible progress. The system got stronger.
dashboard.trigger_empty: No trigger data yet. The next emergency mode or incident will make this map smarter.
dashboard.weekly_focus_start: Collect more data and protect the next clean decision.
dashboard.weekly_focus_trigger: Prepare a counter-move for “{trigger}” before it appears again.
dashboard.weekly_focus_incidents: Lower the risk environment first: distance, water, movement, support.
dashboard.weekly_focus_consistency: Your rhythm is working. Repeat the same clean close today.
dashboard.status_line: System is online. Hold the line today.
dashboard.mission_text: Close the day clean, choose your reason and pass support forward.
dashboard.money_title: Money is coming back to you
dashboard.money_story: This week you saved {amount}. You can afford things that used to disappear into cigarettes or alcohol.
dashboard.money_reframe: In {days} days you saved {amount}. Before, this money would have gone into {target}. Now you can buy what you used to postpone.
dashboard.old_spend_smoking: cigarettes, lighters and someone else's rhythm
dashboard.old_spend_vape: liquids, devices and another nicotine loop
dashboard.old_spend_alcohol: alcohol, impulse spending and a heavy morning
dashboard.old_spend_both: cigarettes, alcohol and the old evening script
dashboard.empty_logs: The journal is empty. The first clean day is already becoming history.

health_visual.title: How your system is recovering
health_visual.next_focus_body: The nearest visible progress is {system}. Come back later and watch the scale grow.

stages.adaptation: The new pattern is settling in

health_visual.mode_body_smoking: After quitting cigarettes, positive changes begin quickly and continue over months and years.
health_visual.mode_body_vape: After quitting e-cigarettes, the body no longer receives nicotine and aerosol while breathing gradually adapts to the new routine.
health_visual.mode_body_alcohol: Less alcohol can support sleep, energy and mood while reducing long-term strain on the body.
health_visual.mode_body_both: Your body gains more room for breathing, sleep, energy and steady cardiovascular function at the same time.

brain.title: Brain and focus
brain.body: It can become easier to notice impulses, keep attention and choose deliberately.

blood.title: Blood and oxygen
blood.body: During the first days, nicotine and carbon monoxide levels in the blood fall.

nicotine.title: Nicotine load
nicotine.body: After quitting, the body no longer receives new nicotine doses and gradually adapts to life without them.

lungs.title: Lungs and breathing
lungs.body: Over time, coughing and shortness of breath can decrease and breathing may feel easier.

heart.title: Heart and circulation
heart.body: Cardiovascular risks gradually fall as the change is maintained.

detox.title: Detox and metabolism
detox.body: The body gradually leaves the old load pattern and returns resources to recovery.

immunity.title: Immunity and defense
immunity.body: The longer the streak, the more room the body has for steady protection and repair.

energy.title: Energy and tone
energy.body: Sleep, mornings and daytime energy can become more consistent.

sleep.title: Sleep and recovery
sleep.body: Cutting down alcohol can support deeper sleep, mood and clearer mornings.

balance.title: Whole-body balance
balance.body: Long-term strain on the heart, liver, kidneys and metabolism can decrease.

health_visual.disclaimer: This is a motivational visualization of general progress, not a medical diagnosis. The pace of change is individual.

spark.title: Spark
spark.body: The system is online. Every clean choice now leaves a visible trace.

focus.title: Focus
focus.body: You are learning to notice the impulse before it becomes an action.

rhythm.title: Rhythm
rhythm.body: Separate wins are becoming a repeatable daily pattern.

resilience.title: Resilience
resilience.body: A difficult moment is increasingly a task, not a command to relapse.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.body: You see your triggers, the cost of the habit and your working tactics more clearly.

momentum.title: Freedom momentum
momentum.body: Your new rhythm supports you even on low-motivation days.

freedom.title: Freedom
freedom.body: Control is part of your system now. Your work is to strengthen and protect it.

commitment.title: Why are you holding the line today?
commitment.subtitle: Choose one of your reasons. This is not a promise for life, just a clear decision for today.
commitment.saved: Reason of the day locked in. +15 XP

return_brief.title: While you were away
return_brief.subtitle: The system made visible progress over {time}.
return_brief.next_in: Return in about {time} to see the next shift.
return_brief.next_complete_title: The reactor is at full power
return_brief.next_complete_body: Return tomorrow for a new summary of what came back to you.

share.button_subtitle: Create a polished card for Telegram, WhatsApp and more.
share.title: Share progress
share.fallback_downloaded: The browser could not share the image directly, so the PNG was downloaded.
share.motivation_smoking: I have not smoked for {days} days.
share.motivation_vape: I have been free from e-cigarettes for {days} days.
share.motivation_alcohol: I have not drunk alcohol for {days} days.
share.motivation_both: I have not smoked or drunk alcohol for {days} days.
share.motivation_vape_both: I have been free from e-cigarettes and alcohol for {days} days.

social.title: Friends and support
social.subtitle: Follow people, celebrate clean choices and send a short line when it matters.
social.empty_feed_body: Find people by name or email, follow them, and their clean days and craving wins will appear here.
social.search_empty: Enter at least two characters to search.
social.invite_title: Invite a friend into your reactor
social.invite_body: Send a short motivational email with a link to registration.
social.invite_message_placeholder: Join me. Let's turn the next clean day into proof.
social.invite_failed: Could not send the invitation email. Check the mail provider log.
social.no_following: You are not following anyone yet.
social.notification_open: Open the app to see the details.
social.browser_notifications_body: Likes, follows and support will appear as system notifications while the app is running.
social.browser_notifications_denied: Notifications are blocked in browser settings
social.browser_notifications_unsupported: This browser does not support system notifications
social.followed: You are following this person now.

no_rollback.title: No Rollback
no_rollback.description: Ninety days at a new level.

log.incident_saved_body: This is not the end. Continue.

settings.title: Settings
settings.photo_help: JPG, PNG or WebP up to 4 MB. The photo will be cropped to a square.
settings.photo_deleted: Photo deleted. Your selected fallback style is active.
settings.motivation_body: Choose several motives. Dashboard messages will draw directly from them.
settings.reset_body: Opening settings never resets progress. Type RESET only if you really want to restart active streaks.

craving.wave_peak: The wave is loud. Do not negotiate with it.
craving.wave_falling: The wave is already falling. Keep delaying.
craving.wave_control: Control is returning. Choose the next action.

tools.title: Breathing lock
tools.body: Inhale 4, hold 2, exhale 6. Repeat five times.

tools.title: Change location
tools.body: Move to another room or step outside for three minutes.

tools.title: Body reset
tools.body: Water, cold face wash, 20 squats or 300 steps.

craving.support_message: {name}: I am in a craving wave. Please just write me one line: delay it for five minutes.
craving.button_subtitle: Start emergency mode and wait out the craving peak.
craving.title: Do not decide right now.
craving.subtitle: Wait 90 seconds. First lower the noise, then choose from control.
craving.timer_label: wait for the peak to pass
craving.intensity_before: How strong is the urge right now?
protocol_phrases: Your task is not to argue, but to wait it out.
You do not decide forever. Only 90 seconds.
body_actions: Move away from the place or people
craving.result_body: You proved the craving is not permanent. Even if it did not vanish, it became data for protection.
craving.default_action: Pause, water, breathing and distance from the trigger.
actions: Drink a glass of water and leave the room for 3 minutes.
Do 20 squats. No debate, just movement.
Splash cold water on your face and take 10 slow breaths.
Write: I do not obey the addiction command.
Put on music and walk 300 steps.
Brush your teeth or chew mint gum.
Open a window and breathe slowly 10 times.
Write one sentence of control to yourself.

incident.title: This is an incident, not a failure.
incident.subtitle: Record what happened. The lifetime progress stays. Only the relevant streak restarts.
incident.placeholder: Stress after work, company, boredom, anger...

recovery_assistant.profile_body: These answers help tune daily risk, SOS and protection protocols. This is not a medical diagnosis.
recovery_assistant.mode_subtitle: Choose the honest mode. You can change it later in profile.

mode_options.title: Quit now
mode_options.body: The main goal is to hold the clean line from today.

mode_options.title: Reduce gradually
mode_options.body: First lower harm and build control.

mode_options.title: Observe and prepare
mode_options.body: Collect triggers and build a safer plan.

recovery_assistant.hard_forbidden_places: It is hard not to smoke where smoking is forbidden
recovery_assistant.smokes_when_ill: I smoke even when I am ill
recovery_assistant.alcohol_failed_reduce: I try to reduce but cannot
recovery_assistant.medical_normal_body: We will adapt protection to your habits and latest check-ins.
recovery_assistant.medical_caution_body: The app will offer protection protocols and SOS mode more often.
recovery_assistant.medical_danger_body: There may be signs of physical dependence. Do not stop alcohol abruptly without a doctor. Consider Hausarzt or Suchtberatung.
recovery_assistant.daily_recommendation_low: Risk is calm. Keep your usual rhythm and make a short daily check-in.
recovery_assistant.daily_recommendation_medium: There is risk. Choose one protective step before the urge gets loud.
recovery_assistant.daily_recommendation_high: Risk is high today. Turn on protection mode and do not leave the evening without a plan.
recovery_assistant.chain_after_incident: An incident does not erase the path. Now the goal is to stop one episode becoming a chain.
recovery_assistant.chain_high_risk: When risk is high, set simple protection early: pause, body, contact.

chain_steps.title: Contact
chain_steps.body: Ask for a few words of support.

recovery_assistant.health_money_body: Old spending returns to your goal.
recovery_assistant.health_energy_body: From clean days and your check-ins.
recovery_assistant.health_control_body: Grows from pauses, SOS and returning to the line.
recovery_assistant.health_health_body: Soft recovery estimate, not a diagnosis.
recovery_assistant.health_reactor_note: The reactor does not reset because of a mistake. It grows from returning to the line.
recovery_assistant.checkin_body: A short check-in makes relapse risk more accurate.
recovery_assistant.checkin_saved: Check-in saved. Daily risk was recalculated.

impulse.title: Small actions that keep the course
impulse.subtitle: Open one fact, do a short quest or wait out the wave in a mini-game.
impulse.game_body: Start a calm cycle: while the circle breathes, the impulse loses power.
impulse.quest_fallback_body: Write one sentence that explains why you hold the line today.
impulse.fact_fallback: Craving comes in a wave: wait through the first minutes and the decision becomes yours again.
impulse.game_modal_body: Breathe with the circle and simply wait until the wave becomes weaker. You do not need to prove anything.
facts_smoking: Nicotine quickly trains the brain to expect reward, but every resisted wave weakens that script.
Smoke takes part of the blood's oxygen capacity, so clean hours help the body reclaim reserve.
Craving rarely stays flat: it rises, peaks and begins to fall if you do not feed it with action.
facts_vape: E-cigarettes can still keep the nicotine loop alive: the brain waits for a fast relief ritual.
Aerosol and frequent puffs attach the habit to gestures, places and moments, so changing the script matters.
Even without smoke, dependence can live in the expectation of nicotine; a pause returns control.
facts_alcohol: Alcohol can feel like fast rest, but it often worsens sleep quality and next-day recovery.
The more often the brain gets alcohol as a stress response, the harder it becomes to choose other release.
Skipping the automatic drink returns the evening to your control: first decision, then ritual.
facts_control: Habit loves automation. A conscious pause breaks the chain before it becomes action.
One small clean choice today makes the next similar choice easier tomorrow.
Control grows less from maximum willpower and more from repeatable short actions.

quests.title: Change the scene
quests.body: Leave the place where the habit usually starts for three minutes.

quests.title: Control phrase
quests.body: Write one honest reason why today you are not paying the old script.

quests.title: Clean mark
quests.body: Check today and mark what you already kept under control.

general: Craving is not an order. It is noise.
You do not need to win your whole life today. Win the next five minutes.
Addiction asks for tax. Today you do not pay.
You are not giving something up. You are taking control back.
Freedom rarely arrives loudly. It usually begins with a quiet no.
Every hour in control makes the next choice a little easier.
You are no longer at the starting point. The system remembers.
Do not wait for perfect motivation. A clean choice works without it.
The old script may knock. You do not have to open the door.
return: Even while you were not watching the counter, your decision kept working.
Progress needs no audience. It accumulates in every clean hour.
You came back not to restart, but to see how far you have moved.
Let this summary be proof that small decisions know how to grow.
The system is stronger. Your task today is to keep its direction.

health: Every clean choice gives your body time to do its work.
Today you are not borrowing health from your future self.
Easier breathing and steadier energy begin with one decision.
Your body remembers the hours you returned to it, not the promises.
money: Today your money works for your life again, not the habit.
Every clean day moves old spending toward a real goal.
You are not saving on yourself. You are ending the habit's funding.
The amount grows because control became an action.
family: The people close to you get more of your presence, not perfection.
Today's choice becomes calmer time beside your family.
You build an example through repeated choices, not speeches.
Attention returned to you can return to the people who matter.
control: The impulse may appear, but the decision still belongs to you.
Control grows whenever a pause appears between craving and action.
You have already proved that the old command is optional.
You set today's course, not the old script.
energy: Build today's charge from sleep, movement and a clean choice.
Your body is learning to answer with energy the habit no longer takes.
Every clean day frees capacity for forward motion.
Do not chase a sharp burst. Build power that remains.
custom: Your own reason matters more than any universal advice.
Return to the reason you chose yourself. It already points forward.

craving: The urge is loud, but it is temporary.
Do not let five minutes steal five days.
The impulse wants speed. Your power is delay.
You can survive this wave without feeding it.
morning: Start the day as the person you promised to become.
The first clean choice sets the system tone.
Fuel the reactor with discipline, not regret.
evening: A clean evening is a gift to tomorrow.
Close the day without paying the old tax.
You are almost through the current mission.
Rest is stronger when it is not borrowed from addiction.
Finish the day on your own terms.
afterIncident: An incident is data, not identity.
Reset the streak, not your self-respect.
The system continues. Learn and move.
One event does not erase the work.
No shame spiral. Back to control.
rewardUnlocked: A new badge for a real decision.
milestone: The next level is closer than it looks.
moneySaved: Money is returning to your life.
Every clean day funds your goal.
The goal is not abstract anymore.
